ORDERED ASSIGNED TO DEPT 514 FOR COURT TRIAL. OPENING STATEMENTS GIVEN. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. PARTIES REST. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF, DELFINA MARTINEZ ROBLES, AND AGAINST DEFENDANT ADVOCATE MINES, LTD. FOR INTEREST ON THE SUM OF $110,920.00 OF UNPAID PRINCIPAL IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,008.52, CONSISTING OF THE LEGAL INTEREST RATE FROM OCT. 2, 2007 TO AND INCLUDING THE DATE OF PAYMENT ON JAN. 9, 2008 (99 DAYS TOTAL). REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAY-12-2008 IN DEPT . 514. TRIAL EXHIBITS ORDERED RETURNED TO COUNSEL. JUDGE THOMAS J. MELLON, JR., CLERK: V. MACK, REPORTER: BOB BALIAN CSR 5220
MINUTES FOR MAY-12-2008 10:00 AM FOR DEPT 514
